_comment: HAND-EDITED source for off-platform sponsors (those who don't go through GitHub Sponsors — e.g. WARRIX as a partner, or someone who paid directly). The sync script (scripts/sync-sponsors.mjs, run by .github/workflows/sponsors.yml) merges these with the live GitHub Sponsors list and writes the GENERATED web/sponsors.json. Edit THIS file for manual sponsors; never hand-edit web/sponsors.json (it gets overwritten). `tiers` here is the canonical tier config used in the output. `weight` is a private sort key (never displayed); WARRIX is pinned first via a huge weight. Logos must be local files under web/img/sponsors/ (never hotlink CDN/FB URLs — they expire).
